blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 8,577 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
